description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features large glass windows, multiple balconies with glass railings, and a rooftop green space. The house is set on a rectangular lot with a mix of wooden decking and paved surfaces, including an outdoor pool and patio area. There are several entry points, including a main entrance with steps and a covered carport. The landscaping includes a few strategically placed trees, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The overall structure emphasizes open spaces, natural light, and outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, balconies, and a rooftop green space, set on a landscaped lot with a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, and prominent glass facade with balconies and rooftop greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden deck, pool area, and secondary stairway access to the upper level.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive patio, pool, and large windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, outdoor seating area, and additional balcony spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a covered porch, and a minimalist door integrated into the glass facade
